text:
Once upon a time in the quaint village of Meadowbrook, there lived a woodpecker named Peppy. He was known throughout the forest for his bold personality and knack for finding the sweetest acorns.

Peppy loved exploring new places. One autumn day, he heard stories of golden raisins hidden deep within the Whispering Woods. Legends had said they were as sweet as heaven.

Curious and determined, Peppy took off his bright red hat and flew deeper into the forest. After a long search, he found them! They were nestled among ancient oak trees. Peppy ate several, feeling dizzyingly happy.

After his little adventure, Peppy wanted to share the raisins. He fluttered back to the village, singing his delightful songs about his treasure hunt. People gathered to listen.

"Listen!" Peppy called out.

Everyone leaned in closer.

"There aren't any golden raisins here," Peppy explained, feeling a bit silly.

One stout-hearted woman, Miss Amelia,
